• Creates a fullscreen canvas grid with animated electron particles.
  • Mouse movement spawns highlighted cells and fast‑moving electrons.
  • Uses a low‑opacity blend for trailing visual effects.
    class Electron { … }
    window.addEventListener('mousemove', …)

This page draws a dark grid where each cell can emit glowing particles that drift and fade, producing a smooth trailing effect. Clicking or moving the mouse over the canvas highlights the targeted cell and releases a short‑lived, faster electron. The animation runs continuously with a lightweight render loop that blends frames for a subtle motion blur.
